_comment: Question bank for the PO/PM workshop traffic generator. Each conversation shares one Langfuse session (see `session`). `feedback` is up | down | none. `default_run: false` conversations are skipped unless selected with --only (they are meant for a second app pass under different env, e.g. starved retrieval).

turns.q: How did Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson first meet?
What was Watson's profession before he met Holmes?
Why was Watson looking for someone to share rooms with?
Who is Irene Adler?
How does she outwit Sherlock Holmes?
Why does Holmes keep a photograph of her?
What was the Red-Headed League and what was its real purpose?
What happens in The Adventure of the Speckled Band?
How did Holmes deduce that Watson had been in Afghanistan?
What method does Holmes use to solve his cases?
What does Watson find most impressive about Holmes?
How has working with Holmes changed Watson over the course of their friendship?
What happened between Holmes and Moriarty at the Reichenbach Falls?
Tell me about the case of the Hound of the Baskervilles.
What is Holmes's relationship with his brother Mycroft?
What does Sherlock Holmes think about modern smartphones and the internet?
Wer ist Irene Adler und warum bewundert Holmes sie?
Was geschah zwischen Holmes und Moriarty an den Reichenbachfällen?
What was the Red-Headed League and what was its real purpose?
What happens in The Adventure of the Speckled Band?
